overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia ascending a snowy mountain trail during sunset. The character progresses from a grassy lower slope through pine forests up to a snowy ridge with a distant gothic castle, ending at a cliff overlooking a mountain lake as dusk settles.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower mountain trail with mixed snow and grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through patches of snow and grass on the mountain trail

entered.detail: mixed snow and dirt trail winding uphill
large gray rock formation with patches of snow
tall evergreen trees scattered on the mountainside
green grass visible between snow patches on the ground
weathered wooden post on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a lower mountain slope with mixed snow and grass underfoot. The character walks steadily uphill along a dirt trail, passing weathered wooden posts and scattered pine trees, with a large rocky outcrop visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-mountain snowy trail with emerging castle view

events.description: gothic castle becomes visible in the distance on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill as the terrain becomes increasingly covered in snow

entered.detail: tall stone castle with spires visible on the distant mountain
snow-capped mountain range on the horizon
dense pine forest covering the lower slopes

segments.scene_description: As the character ascends higher, the ground becomes fully snow-covered and a magnificent gothic castle comes into view on the left horizon. The trail continues upward through scattered pine trees, with distant mountain ranges visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with panoramic views

events.description: sunset colors intensify with vibrant orange and pink hues illuminating the sky
mountain lake becomes visible in the valley below to the right

agents.ego_description: traversing the open snowy ridge with the castle prominent in the background

entered.detail: frozen lake visible in the valley below
sunset-lit clouds with pink and orange colors

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an open snowy ridge with panoramic views of the surrounding mountains. The lighting shifts to dramatic golden hour with vibrant sunset colors in the sky, and a frozen mountain lake becomes visible in the valley below while the gothic castle remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking mountain valley at dusk

events.description: lighting shifts to deeper blue hour as the sun sets below the horizon

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the snowy cliff edge overlooking the lake and forest valley

entered.detail: valley filled with mist and low clouds
dense dark pine forest in the shadows below

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character descending a snowy cliff edge as dusk settles into blue hour. The mountain lake now appears to the left, nestled within a dark forested valley filled with mist, while the warm sunset colors fade from the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a mountain trail that transforms from a grassy lower slope into a frozen alpine ridge under a fading sunset. It begins on a dirt path with mixed snow and grass, moving past weathered wooden posts and scattered pine trees beside a large rocky outcrop. As the character climbs higher, the terrain becomes fully snow-covered and the horizon opens to reveal a magnificent gothic castle to the left and distant mountain ranges to the right. The scene then expands onto an open snowy ridge where the lighting shifts to a dramatic golden hour, unveiling a frozen mountain lake in the valley below. Finally, the camera descends a snowy cliff edge as the warm sunset colors fade into the blue hour of dusk, leaving the lake nestled within a dark, mist-filled forested valley.
